mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chunk_record (file_id, chunk_index, chunk_md5, chunk_size, etag, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{r.fileId}, #{r.chunkIndex}, #{r.chunkMd5}, #{r.chunkSize}, #{r.etag}, #{r.status.code}, NOW(3), NOW(3)) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE chunk_md5 = VALUES(chunk_md5), chunk_size = VALUES(chunk_size), etag = VALUES(etag), status = VALUES(status), updated_at = NOW(3)
